title: Robinhood Completes Acquisition of Bitstamp
raw_text: This strategic combination better positions Robinhood to expand outside of the US and brings a trusted and reputable institutional business to Robinhood. Robinhood Markets, Inc. (“Robinhood”) has closed its acquisition of Bitstamp Ltd. (“Bitstamp”), a global cryptocurrency exchange. Bitstamp was founded in 2011 and has offices in Luxembourg, the UK, Slovenia, Singapore, and the US.
evidence_excerpt: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (“Robinhood”) has closed its acquisition of Bitstamp Ltd. (“Bitstamp”), a global cryptocurrency exchange.

title: CFTC Orders Event-Based Binary Options Markets Operator to Pay $1.4 Million Penalty
raw_text: CFTC Orders Event-Based Binary Options Markets Operator to Pay $1.4 Million Penalty Washington, D.C. — The Commodity Futures Trading Commission today entered an order filing and simultaneously settling charges against Delaware-registered Blockratize, Inc. d/b/a Polymarket, based in New York City, for offering off-exchange event-based binary options contracts and failure to obtain designation as a designated contract market (DCM) or registration as a swap execution facility (SEF). The order requires that Polymarket pay a $1.4 million civil monetary penalty, facilitate the resolution (i.e. wind down) of all markets displayed on Polymarket.com that do not comply with the Commodity Exchange Act (CEA) and applicable CFTC regulations, and cease and desist from violating the CEA and CFTC regulations, as charged.
evidence_excerpt: Washington, D.C. — The Commodity Futures Trading Commission today entered an order filing and simultaneously settling charges against Delaware-registered Blockratize, Inc. d/b/a Polymarket, based in New York City, for offering off-exchange event-based binary options contracts and failure to obtain designation as a designated contract market (DCM) or registration as a swap execution facility (SEF).
limitations: Historical regulator source. It should support risk context, not a fresh post-baseline alert by itself.

title: Spain blocks access to Polymarket and Kalshi as it launches gambling licence investigation
raw_text: Tue 26 May 2026 15.46 CESTLast modified on Tue 26 May 2026 17.39 CEST Spain’s ministry of consumer rights has blocked access to Polymarket and Kalshi while it investigates whether the leading prediction market sites are violating Spanish law by operating without a gambling licence. On Tuesday the ministry said it had launched disciplinary proceedings against the two platforms, which allow users to bet on everything from the weather to political events, amid allegations that they lacked the “necessary administrative authorisation” to operate in Spain.
evidence_excerpt: Spain’s ministry of consumer rights has blocked access to Polymarket and Kalshi while it investigates whether the leading prediction market sites are violating Spanish law by operating without a gambling licence.
limitations: Secondary news source; an official Spanish regulator source would be stronger.

title: Consumo ordena el bloqueo de Polymarket y Kalshi en Espana por operar sin licencia de juego
raw_text: Madrid - 26 may 2026 - 08:41CEST El Boletín Oficial del Estado (BOE) ha publicado este martes la apertura de un expediente sancionador contra los mercados de predicciones y apuestas Polymarket y Kalshi al considerarlos plataformas de juego de azar que operan en España sin la necesaria licencia administrativa. El Ministerio de Consumo ha emitido una orden para bloquear en España las páginas web de estas dos plataformas como medida cautelar hasta la resolución definitiva del expediente.
evidence_excerpt: El Boletín Oficial del Estado (BOE) ha publicado este martes la apertura de un expediente sancionador contra los mercados de predicciones y apuestas Polymarket y Kalshi al considerarlos plataformas de juego de azar que operan en España sin la necesaria licencia administrativa.
limitations: Spanish secondary news source; useful backup for Spain blocking evidence until an official BOE or DGOJ source is cataloged.

title: From Wall Street to your wallet: Tokenized equities now available on Kraken
raw_text: From Wall Street to your wallet: Tokenized equities now available on Kraken We’re beginning a phased rollout of tokenized U.S. stocks and ETFs – powered by Backed’s xStocks innovation – for eligible non-U.S. clients. Share on X (Opens in new window)
evidence_excerpt: We’re beginning a phased rollout of tokenized U.S. stocks and ETFs – powered by Backed’s xStocks innovation – for eligible non-U.S. clients.

title: xStocks Risk Disclosure
raw_text: Base Prospectus and related Final Terms for xStocks xStocks are issued by Backed Assets (JE) Limited (a Jersey private limited company) (the "Issuer"), and offered to certain Kraken clients by Payward Digital Solutions Ltd. (“PDSL”), a Bermuda exempted company licensed to conduct digital asset business by the Bermuda Monetary Authority. Holders of xStocks do not have ownership in any of the underlying stock or shares of the companies to which they are economically linked ("underlying stock"); instead, by purchasing xStocks investors can benefit from exposure to the performance of the underlying stock.

(“PDSL”), a Bermuda exempted company licensed to conduct digital asset business by the Bermuda Monetary Authority.

title: Kraken to Acquire NinjaTrader: Introducing the Next Era of Professional Trading
raw_text: Makes Kraken a leader in the U.S. futures market for both traditional and crypto trading, and accelerates its multi-asset-class ambitions — which include plans for equities trading and payments. CHEYENNE, Wyo.--Kraken, one of the longest-standing, most liquid and secure crypto platforms serving more than 15 million clients globally, has entered into an agreement to acquire NinjaTrader, the leading U.S. retail futures trading platform, for $1.5 billion, subject to certain purchase price adjustments. This acquisition strengthens Kraken’s position as a 24/7, always-on technology platform built for professional traders, making it a leader in U.S. futures for both traditional and crypto markets.
evidence_excerpt: CHEYENNE, Wyo.--Kraken, one of the longest-standing, most liquid and secure crypto platforms serving more than 15 million clients globally, has entered into an agreement to acquire NinjaTrader, the leading U.S. retail futures trading platform, for $1.5 billion, subject to certain purchase price adjustments.
limitations: Official Kraken press page does not expose a clean machine-readable publication date in the current catalog.

title: Circle Investor Relations
raw_text: Circle Internet Group, Inc. - Investor Relations Circle is a global financial technology firm that enables businesses of all sizes to harness the power of digital currencies and public blockchains for payments, commerce, and financial applications worldwide. Circle is building the world’s largest, most-widely used, stablecoin network, and issues, through its regulated affiliates, USDC and EURC stablecoins.
evidence_excerpt: Circle is a global financial technology firm that enables businesses of all sizes to harness the power of digital currencies and public blockchains for payments, commerce, and financial applications worldwide.

title: Circle Mint
raw_text: Access & distribute USDC at scale Circle Mint is the fastest and most cost effective way for distributors to access and redeem USDC and EURC. Manage funds securely, and seamlessly distribute them to crypto wallets around the world, 24/7.

title: Circle Payments Network
raw_text: What is Circle Payments Network (CPN)? Circle Payments Network (CPN) is a global network of partners, including banks, payment service providers (PSPs), virtual asset service providers (VASPs), and enterprises, who enable consumer, business, and institutional payments with 24/7 real-time settlement via stablecoins like USDC and EURC. What are the benefits of CPN for network participants?

title: USDC | Powering global finance. Issued by Circle.
